PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT B. MORI, LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GANZ, FRANCES DBA FRANCES DESIGNS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT B. MORI, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF FRANCES GANZ IS PRESENT. B. MORI, LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA TSE, OWNER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.
